title: Neostalgia: Beta & Beyond
description: A Beta+ modpack with everything new and more! Experience beta like never before!
body:
# **Welcome to Neostalgia!**

 This pack is an expansion on the classic beta experience while incorperating everything modern and more! With nice blend of old and new, packed with qol features (and extra goodies) that'll enhance the experience even further!

 Although there are many mods(330 of them!), overall this pack has been heavily optimised and most mods are super light weight, so performance shouldn't be too much of an issue. I'll update as needed, I hope you all have fun with this!

_**I do reccomend setting your ram useage to at least 6-10 gigs, and a render distance of 10-15 for optimal performance.**_
__________________________________________________________________________________________________

## **Notable Features**
- Reworked Health/Food system (no more hunger!)
- Enhanced world gen with the lovely Cascades mod by Crystalis7 (very underrated)
- Many new structures, ruins, dungeons, trial chambers, and biomes to explore, all in line with the theme of the pack
- New mobs, both hostile and passive
- Nether and End terrain improvements
- Many qol mods without too much feature clutter
- Custom made programmer art compatibility packs for some mods
- And So Much More! (no more spoilers)
__________________________________________________________________________________________________

### **Will this be updated to 1.22+?**

Once the mods in this pack all get updated for it then i'll move it to 1.22+

## Join the Beta Refabicated discord server for future community updates! [https://discord.gg/zevjXrd5Pd](https://discord.gg/zevjXrd5Pd)
______________________________________________________________________________________________________________________
